docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TON, PHUC A. AS TO DEFENDANT HERREN, RAMEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HERREN, RAMEL
